summary: E-commerce website for selling cosmetics products.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Elegant cosmetics hero banner with soft blush and ivory tones, gold accent light streaks, and artfully arranged makeup and skincare products on a marble surface (hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png)
- Minimalist cosmetics product placeholder showing a sleek bottle silhouette on a blush-pink background with soft shadows (product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png)
- Promotional strip background with a warm champagne gradient and scattered rose petals texture (promo-banner.dim_1400x120.png)

existing_features.title: Build a Homepage with: a full-width hero banner section with a headline and call-to-action button, a 'Featured Products' section showing featured products in a responsive grid, and a promotional banner or marquee strip highlighting offers.

Build a Product Catalog page that displays all cosmetics products in a responsive grid. Include filter controls for product category and price range. Each product card shows the product image, name, category, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.
Build a Product Detail page accessible from product cards. Display the product's image, name, category, full description, price, stock status, and an 'Add to Cart' button with quantity selector.

Build a Shopping Cart page that displays current cart line items with product name, image, unit price, quantity controls, and line total. Show the cart subtotal, and provide a 'Proceed to Checkout' button and a 'Remove' option per item.

Build a Checkout page with a simple order summary and a 'Place Order' button. On confirmation, call the backend placeOrder method, clear the cart, and display an order confirmation message with the order ID.

Apply a luxurious, clean visual theme throughout the site: a soft warm neutral palette (ivory, blush rose, champagne gold accents), elegant serif headings, smooth hover transitions on cards and buttons, generous whitespace, and a sticky top navigation bar with the brand logo, navigation links (Home, Shop, Cart), and a cart icon with item count badge.
Render the generated static image assets (hero banner, product placeholder images) from frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the Homepage hero, product cards, and detail pages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Product detail pages with images and descriptions
Homepage with featured products and promotions

Implement a backend data model and actor methods for cosmetics products, including fields for: id, name, category, description, price, imageUrl, stock quantity, and featured flag. Provide CRUD operations: addProduct, getProducts, getProductById, updateProduct, deleteProduct, and a query to fetch featured products.

Implement a backend shopping cart model: each cart is keyed by a session/user identifier, containing line items (productId, quantity). Provide methods: addToCart, removeFromCart, updateCartItem, getCart, and clearCart.

Implement a backend orders model. Provide a placeOrder method that accepts a cart, creates an order record with fields: id, items, totalPrice, status (pending/completed), and timestamp. Provide a getOrders query to retrieve all orders.
